name: Biomarkers
description: Lab values, blood and urine analytes, inflammatory markers, cytokines, lipid panels, glucose, HbA1c, CBC, blood pressure

name: Anthropometry
description: Body size and shape measurements: height, weight, BMI, waist/hip/arm/neck circumference, body composition

name: Imaging
description: Imaging-derived measurements: coronary calcium score, carotid IMT, bone density, retinal photography, echocardiography

name: Respiratory
description: Lung function tests and respiratory measurements: spirometry, FEV1, FVC, peak flow, bronchodilator response, blood gas

name: Disease Events
description: Disease occurrence, clinical events, diagnosis history: MI, angina, stroke, VTE, cancer diagnosis, disease status

name: Medications
description: Drug and medication use status: antihypertensives, statins, insulin, hormone therapy, medication inventory

name: Substance Use
description: Tobacco, alcohol, and drug use: smoking status, alcohol frequency, nicotine dependence, drug screening

name: Diet
description: Food intake and nutrition: dietary intake questionnaires, food frequency, nutrient analysis

name: Exercise
description: Physical activity and fitness: treadmill tests, accelerometer data, 6-minute walk, cardiorespiratory fitness

name: Sleep
description: Sleep patterns and disorders: sleep duration, sleep apnea, polysomnography

name: Demographics
description: Basic participant characteristics: age, sex, gender, cohort membership

name: Race and Ethnicity
description: Self-reported race, ethnicity, Hispanic subgroup

name: Ancestry
description: Genetically computed ancestry and population structure

name: Geography
description: Location and residence: geographic site, birthplace, address, residential history, years in US

name: Socioeconomic
description: Income, education, employment, insurance, occupation, household composition, media use, marital status, military service, day care

name: Reproductive Health
description: Reproduction, pregnancy, sexual health: menstrual history, contraception, puberty, fertility, breastfeeding

name: Environment
description: Environmental exposures: air contaminants, UV exposure, water source, occupational exposures, passive smoke

name: Mental Health
description: Psychological and psychiatric measures: depression, anxiety, cognition, autism screening, suicidal ideation, stress

name: General Health
description: Vision and eye care, dental care, hand dominance, functional impairment, scoliosis, general quality of life and wellbeing

name: Study Administration
description: Study infrastructure: participant/sample IDs, consent, analyte type, specimen info
